Joseph and his colleagues were extremely educated on the Department of Health investigation process and were so great at keeping me informed and reassured. Joseph and his team were the best part about working with Chapman Law Group. He was incredibly patient and guided me through the panic-inducing process of defending your license to the Board of Nursing and the Department of Health.  He tirelessly reassured me throughout this process and answered my endless questions. reviews.text:
I retained Joseph Iennaco as my attorney to assist with matters concerning both my employer and my medical license. Unfortunately, from the outset, he failed to advocate for me effectively. He never took the time to understand my full story, which hindered our ability to develop a strong and cohesive defense.

The initial letter he sent to my employer was worded in a passive and unassertive manner, giving the impression that he was not committed to defending my interests. Moreover, he failed to inform me that he had initiated communications with my employer’s legal counsel. I only became aware of this after some time had passed and I inquired about any updates. At that point, he disclosed that he had been in contact with them for a week and had scheduled a meeting for the following day—none of which had been communicated to me.

During that meeting, he was presented with incorrect information that contradicted what I had previously shared with him. Had he taken the time to understand my account thoroughly, he would have been able to correct those inaccuracies and potentially resolve the issue. Instead, he accepted their version of events without challenge and failed to advocate on my behalf. When I asked if we could submit a response, he told me, “They’ve already made their decision; it’s unlikely they’ll change their mind.” His approach was consistently passive, and at no point did he genuinely fight for me.

Despite these concerns, I continued to retain him as my attorney. Unfortunately, he later provided advice that was ultimately construed as obstruction of an investigation. This advice placed me in a significantly worse position. Even after this occurred, he showed no empathy, took no responsibility, and made no effort to help rectify the situation.

I strongly urge anyone considering hiring Joseph Iennaco to conduct thorough research. In my experience, he lacked the necessary experience, failed to communicate effectively, did not advocate for me, and demonstrated a lack of empathy throughout the process. I am currently considering filing a bar complaint due to the harm his counsel has caused in my case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Sahajahan,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're truly sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet your expectations. Your concerns are important to us, and we’d like the opportunity to learn more.

Please feel free to reach out to us directly at "info@chapmanlawgroup.com" so we can better understand what happened.

Sincerely,
Chapman Law Group

reviews.text:
I have been an R.N. for 28+ years and worked at the same hospital for a total of 31 years, 28 as an R.N.  After this horrible hospital did what they did here in Key West, as a set up because I was old and near the top of the pay scale a family member looked up attorneys.  I called THE CHAPMAN LAW GROUP.  First off I never had to make another call.  Sara Bazzigaluppi, Attorney was assigned to my case with her amazing assistant Griceli Vargas-Gonzalez.

This was the most humbling and horrible experience of my life.  Both Ms Bazzigaluppi and Ms. Vargas-Gonzalez were so attentive and understanding of my situation.  Knowledgeable in the art of medicine and so kind and reassuring that by the end of our first phone conversation we were on a first name basis, Sara (attorney) and Griceli ( legal assistant )

In a nut shell I learned patience which was well needed in this situation and I allowed them to take care of everything and they did.  This was worth every penny that was spent to have had such amazing, down to earth, legal team fighting for my career and my reputation.   As I I knew, in the back of my mind everything would be OK I told myself to let go and trust again and this amazing team of Sara and Griceli did just what they said they would do.  Nothing was filed against me as nothing was found to be sufficient for probable cause and therefore the case was not even filed it was dismissed.

Sara and Griceli did the job they set out to do so if anyone reading this doesn’t want to put forth the money I get it but you have to be represented by a great team and these two were the bomb and it will be the beat money you will ever spend.

Respectfully,
Another R.N.

reviews.ownerResponse: As I previously replied to your review from 10/11/23, the family law intake form asks about job and salary because both are relevant in all family law cases, including for the calculation of child support and alimony. In addition, there are forms required to be filed in family law cases that are income specific, so annual income is information necessary to ensure the correct form is completed. It has nothing to do with the fee. The fees are quoted on a case-by-case basis, after an initial interview with me familiarizing myself with the complexities of the case. I find it’s better to provide an accurate expectation of what the anticipated attorney’s fees will be rather than quote an unrealistic low fee just to be retained.  I charge a reasonable fee for the service provided.  If I recall correctly, when you acted as an independent party as a real property appraiser in a dissolution case I had, you appraised the incorrect property despite being provided the correct address.

reviews.ownerResponse:
The family law intake form asks about job and salary because both are relevant in all family law cases, including for the calculation of child support and alimony. In addition, there are forms required to be filed in family law cases that are income specific, so annual income is information necessary to ensure the correct form is completed. The intake form has evolved over the course of 40 years of practice and contains questions relevant to most dissolution of marriage, paternity, and child support cases. It has nothing to do with the fee.
The fees are quoted on a case-by-case basis, after an initial interview and the attorney familiarizing himself with the complexities of the case. We find it’s better to provide an accurate expectation of what the anticipated attorney’s fees will be rather than quote an unrealistic low fee just to be retained.

HE WON MY CASE!!!
For the past 2 1/2 years the plaintiff and her 2 attorneys did everything they could to persuade the court I was not entitled to the reimbursement of my initial investment and major home improvements following the sale of our disputed property.

Mr. Pike's knowledge of the law combined with his years of experience  prevailed over all the frivolous claims they made against me.   In addition, Mr. Pike tried on multiple,  multiple  occasions to educate the plaintiff and her attorneys on Florida law regarding the equitable distribution of funds or equity, but they steadfastly refused to settle or withdraw their misguided  claim.

Highly recommend without reservation!  Attorney Pike is and was very knowledgeable, friendly, sympathetic and encouraging regarding my  "partition agreement"  property issue.

I contacted Mr. Pike regarding taking a deceased family members name off of a warranty deed on October 30, 2025.  We had a very nice discussion via cell phone and he told me to bring the documents to his office the next morning and see his legal assistant Terry.

I arrived at his office the next morning on October 31, 2025 at 9:07AM to find the office locked.  I knocked on the door and Mr. Pike came to the door, he indicated he was on the phone and I need to "drop and go."  He took the documents out of my hand and I promptly left.  I never heard another word from Mr. Pike, so I telephoned his assistant on November 11, 2025, and asked the status.  She replied "I am not aware of the file, I will need to contact Mr. Pike.  A few days later, I received an email from Mr. Pike which stated "Once the recorded document is available, Teri will email them back to you." "I will bill you what you seem to
believe this was worth - $0.00."  True to his word, I received the filed affidavit as an attachment to another email. Problem is, the filed affidavit had the wrong date of death on it.

Fighting for Justice: A Grateful Family's Experience

Our case involved a claim of negligence against a former daycare regarding the well-being of our son. Throughout this challenging experience, Mr. Podor and his team proved to be invaluable allies in our pursuit of justice. Jesse consistently provided prompt responses to our inquiries and ensured that our concerns were addressed swiftly. Response to Holland Law.   I maintain that my statements are correct.   I hired your firm to represent me because of an issue with Chase Bank.    Your firm did absolutely nothing.   Your attorney did not call me,  communicate with me or ask me a single question about the situation.   I sent her a packet of documents concerning the dispute, and it is quite obvious that no one read them. Maybe there should be better up front communication during the initial contact informing the client that the only action we are going to take is have you sign these documents. That’s it. reviews.text:
I am a retired personal injury lawyer and a retired Judge from New York. During my 40 years of practicing law; I have been involved with or presided over thousands of personal injury cases. As you can imagine; I had many choices available to me (in selecting a lawyer) when I was I struck by another vehicle while walking in a parking lot.  As a result of the offending driver’s negligence: I was seriously injured and required spinal surgery.

After a great deal of research and several interviews, I had the privilege of meeting Carl Reynolds. From the outset, Mr. Reynolds was engaging and extremely professional.

He and his team, especially Brett, were involved and engaged in my lawsuit.  I was injured on 12/4/2024 and within one year; my case was settled for not one policy but they were able to secure additional compensation from a secondary policy.  They also, took care of my health care bills and made sure that all of the bills were paid and that I would not be left holding the “bag” so to speak  with surprise bills from health care providers after my case was resolved.  This latter point is critical when selecting a personal injury lawyer.

I highly recommend this firm. Mr. Reynolds is an experienced, first rate lawyer and an engaging and compassionate person.  Thank you Mr. Reynolds and team for a wonderful job.  I’m grateful.  The Judge.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Good Morning Judge,
Thank you so much for taking the time to write us a review. It means the world to us to be able to serve and help those in need--especially one as esteemed as yourself with knowledge of and experience in personal injury law and jurisprudence. We know you had a lot of options out there and we are humbled and grateful you gave us the opportunity to serve you. It was truly our pleasure! We wish you all the best in all your future endeavors. Don't be a stranger!
Best Regards,
Carl Reynolds, Owner

Update: This firm owner appreciates an opportunity to become better. The down-to-earth accountability and understanding that nobody's perfect is expressed honestly by him.  His Kind response shows sensitivity with understanding that mistakes happen.
reviews.ownerResponse: Good Evening.  I am so, so sorry for your negative interaction with my firm recently and that your recent experience is completely out of character with your prior experiences with our firm and the experience of a vast majority of our clients.  We have four offices along the Suncoast; so, we are usually less than 45 minutes away from most Manatee and Sarasota County residents--I'm sorry we do not have an office location closer to where you live.  In addition, while our normal operating hours are 8am to 5pm, there is almost always an attorney or paralegal working at our four locations at hours prior to and well after normal business hours.  Please feel free to call me directly so I can figure out how this could have happened in this very isolated instance and to make sure it never happens again.  Thank you for bringing this issue to my attention so that we can improve on our standard of care to all our precious clients and potential clients.  Thank you.

reviews.text:
They say ‘injuries are personal’ but they will choose who they want to ‘fight’ for or against and for what reason. They may make a few calls, but they don’t want to have to ‘fight’ for you. They let my daughter’s case go after the pip insurance ran out when it was against the city of Sarasota and the police dept from an ambulance that ran a red light and crashed into my truck she was driving. They say they had reason not to pursue, but it was not even a justifiable contributing factor in the case. Just a good excuse not to continue the case.
Don’t believe they’re not in it for the easy money, they’ll get the FIRST third of anything they get for you. But I’m sure this is true for all the injury attorneys. Caveat emptor-let the buyer beware or aware. We were referred to  them via the physical therapist that was providing the care.
reviews.ownerResponse: Good Evening and thank you for your feedback.  Please have your daughter call me directly so I can explain further the issue that prevented us from moving forward on her case.  As you may or may not know, the Florida legislature passed a sweeping tort reform law back in March 2023 that renders certain claims under certain circumstances no longer prosecutable.  It has nothing to do with "easy money" versus hard fought money--it has to do with what the law allows as compensable injuries and what the law no longer allows.  We do not shy away from difficult cases or cases involving a "fight."  In fact, earlier this year we obtained a $2,400,000 verdict against Sarasota County--a case Sarasota County denied and fought us all the way through a weeklong trial until a jury of our client's peers awarded our permanently injured client $2.4MM.  We are always fighting against big bully insurance companies and corporations (and even the government if it is justified) on behalf of our wrongfully injured clients--and we will always do so--whatever it takes within the confines of the law.
Thank you Emmanuel for your review!  It was our pleasure serving you!

After a complicated and lengthy legal battle over my divorce, I can say with certainty that I had the best possible divorce attorney. From day one, Matt demonstrated impressive legal acumen and a strategic approach that seemed to anticipate all moves made by the opposing counsel. My case involved substantial assets, business interests, and there was great deal at stake. Yet, Matt handled every detail with precision. He has an ability to analyze complex situations and transform them into legal advantages. He never improvises; everything is calculated. As the case unfolded, it was apparent that he was several steps ahead of the other side. Thanks to his experience, determination, and intelligence, we achieved an outcome that exceeded my expectations. If you are in need of a divorce attorney who is exceptional, strategic, and well prepared, I cannot recommend anyone better. Matt Martell is an exceptional find.

I was fortunate to work with this divorce attorney during one of the most complex and protracted legal processes of my life. As a businessman, I had a lot at stake: my assets, investments, and the stability of my future. From day one, he demonstrated an exceptional level of professionalism, strategy, and preparation.
Throughout the legal battle, he always stayed one step ahead, anticipating moves and protecting my interests with firmness and clarity. His communication was constant and transparent, which gave me great confidence at every stage of the process. The final outcome exceeded my expectations and allowed me to close this chapter with peace of mind. I highly recommend him to anyone who needs a truly competent and dedicated divorce attorney focused on achieving solid results.

When I faced a high-conflict divorce, I knew I needed top-tier legal representation, and this attorney exceeded all my expectations. My ex-wife attempted maneuvers that I considered blatantly unfair, even hiring a highly competent but untrustworthy lawyer with the intention of taking nearly 80% of my assets.
Thanks to my attorney's experience, strategy, and unwavering resolve, those attempts failed. Throughout the entire process—which was lengthy and highly contested—he remained focused, prepared, and always one step ahead. As a business owner with significant assets at stake, I needed someone who would truly protect my interests, and that's exactly what he did.
The final outcome was fair and very favorable considering the complexity of the case. His professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to handle difficult litigation clearly set him apart. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone seeking a truly effective divorce attorney.

I've been building my business for many years, and divorce threatened to jeopardize everything I worked so hard to achieve. What impressed me most about my attorney was his personal commitment: he didn't treat me as just another client, but as someone whose history and assets needed to be respected.
Every step was backed by meticulous preparation. He gathered evidence, built solid arguments, and, above all, was relentless in defending my legal rights. I felt like he was speaking up for my hard work, my rights as a father, and my business at every hearing.
In the end, we achieved a fair outcome, which allowed me to protect most of my assets and continue to maintain my role as a business owner without day-to-day limitations. Attorney Matt Martell made the difference: not only did he successfully complete my case, but he also restored my faith in the justice system.

Before consulting Mr. Martell, I was on the verge of losing a large part of my assets. I was afraid that years of work and sacrifice it would be lost in a grueling divorce process. However, he not only had mastered the law pertaining to divorce, but also understood the mindset of a small business owner.
He thoroughly analyzed my situation, identified key points I would never have seen, and negotiated firmly before each hearing and at both mediations. What I valued most was his ability to keep me focused, instilling confidence in me even in the most dark and tense moments.
The result was much better than expected: I maintained my financial stability, my businesses remain intact, and I feel prepared for a new stage in my life.
A lawyer like this not only wins cases, but he builds trust and supports the financial efforts of a lifetime of hard work.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much!

As a lawyer, I am constrained by the Rules Regulating the Florida Bar in responding in detail, but I will simply state that it is my belief that these comments pertaining to this mediation present neither a fair nor accurate picture of what occurred, and I believe that the comments are false.

May 2, 2025

Kevin Groom to:

Dear Attorney Shannan Neri,

I am writing to express my heartfelt gratitude for your exceptional representation in my recent - personal injury lawsuit. Your dedication, professionalism, and expertise made a significant difference in the outcome of my case, and I am deeply appreciative of the time and effort you invested in securing a favorable resolution.

Throughout the process, your clear communication, strategic approach, and genuine care for my well-being gave me confidence and peace of mind during a challenging time. Your ability to navigate complex legal matters while keeping me informed and supported was greatly appreciated. Thanks to your hard work, I feel that justice was served, and I am now able to move forward with greater security and closure.

I wholeheartedly recommend your services to anyone in need of a skilled, compassionate, and results-driven attorney. Your professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to achieving the best possible outcome make you an outstanding advocate. I would not hesitate to work with you again or refer you to friends, family, or colleagues seeking legal representation.

Thank you once again for your tireless efforts and for making such a positive impact on my life. Please do not hesitate to contact me if I can ever serve as a reference or provide a testimonial for your services.

With gratitude and respect,

Kevin Groom

reviews.text: Definitely disappointed as I was referred to this firm. Because of who referred me I put my trust completely in their hands and have been let down over and over again. At no point have I been take serious and the only thing that comes out of Samantha’s mouth is “this is a $100,000 policy.” Not “are you ok” or “are you being taken care of”. I could go through the list from my car being totaled to not being able to get to my doctors appointments. I have no idea who holds Samantha accountable but I spoke to a female attorney who basically told me how everyone loves Samantha. Which basically made me feel like I was being called a liar. I asked for a quick settlement out of frustration and now I don’t even care to have any type of Settlement with this law firm. Please be careful when choosing this firm.

That’s helpful feedback for us, and we’re always looking for ways to improve communication and make the process feel as smooth and clear as possible for our clients. As a real estate broker and business owner, having the right legal guidance is absolutely essential. I trust Crystal Golm and her firm with all of my business transactions, and I can confidently say she is one of the best business attorneys in Manatee and Sarasota County.

Her professionalism, attention to detail, and deep knowledge of business and real estate law give me complete peace of mind. She is responsive, reliable, and always looks out for the best interests of her clients.

If you are a business owner, investor, or real estate professional looking for a knowledgeable and trustworthy attorney, I highly recommend her services.

We recently closed on our new home in Bradenton, FL and had the pleasure of working with Golm Law Firm, and I can’t say enough good things about the experience. From start to finish, the entire process was handled with a high level of professionalism, attention to detail, and care.

Melissa was fantastic to work with. She made what can often be a complex real estate transaction feel smooth and effortless. All documentation was clear, organized, and provided in a timely manner, and communication throughout the process was prompt and thorough.

When dealing with significant purchases like real estate, precision and responsiveness are incredibly important—and Melissa and the team at Golm Law Firm delivered on both.

We wouldn’t hesitate to work with them again and highly recommend Melissa at Golm Law Firm to anyone looking for a knowledgeable and reliable real estate attorney in the Bradenton area.

Thank you again for helping make the closing process such a smooth and confident transition into our new home.
